acceptedRisks.summary: EPUB ZIP 中央目录声明预算未独立预检
acceptedRisks.detail: Static audit residual: ZIP central-directory declared-size budget is not independently preflighted before import. Maintainer accepts this remaining risk for the 1.0.0 release decision; it is not claimed fixed.

acceptedRisks.summary: EPUB/Web/AI 写入阶段取消未形成统一可中断事务
acceptedRisks.detail: Static audit residual: EPUB import write/resume, web import, and AI save cancellation paths are not unified into a single interruptible transaction model. Maintainer accepts this remaining risk for the 1.0.0 release decision; it is not claimed fixed.

decision.statement: Maintainer Samuelxiaozhuofeng states personal Orca runtime testing is complete and accepts 1.0.0 for release execution. Itemized historical Console attachment gaps are not fabricated into pass evidence; residual static-audit risks live in acceptedRisks. Tag, formal zip, GitHub Release, and awesome-orcanote PR are still pending external ops (Codex).
